title: anthemis stiparum subsp. intermedia
intro: Anthemis stiparum subsp. intermedia, also known as a type of yarrow, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of anthemis stiparum subsp. intermedia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to soothe and calm the body, particularly when used in combination with other herbs.
